title: Better Block Breakdown Recipe│更好的方塊分解配方
description: Add more recipe for block breakdown.│添加更多的方塊分解的配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- Breakdown Recipe that adds Leather,Wool, Block of Quartz, Dripstone Block, Block of Amethyst, Honeycomb Block, Clay, and Glowstone.│分解配方添加了皮革、羊毛、石英方塊、滴水石錐方塊、紫水晶方塊、蜂巢塊、黏土和螢石。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**

- Clay and Glowstone drop themselves when destroyed.│黏土和螢石被破壞時會掉落自身。
- This Datapack allows more items to be stored through crafting blocks, but also makes some items easier to obtain, which may affect game balance.│該資料包允許透過製作方塊儲存更多物品，但也使某些物品更容易獲得，這可能會影響遊戲平衡。
